text: Kinesis Video Streams @ et © s ¢ Ingest live video data from producers * Security Cameras, smartphones, cars, drones, time-serialised audio, thermal, depth and RADAR data. e Consumers can access data frame-by-frame ... or as needed e Can persist and encrypt (in-transit and at rest) data... e ... can't access directly via storage .. only via APIs ¢ Integrates with other AWS services e.g. Rekognition and Connect.
